questionHtml: Within the base sequence shown in the diagram, the sequence for the stop codon UGA appears. Explain the reasons for translation continuing beyond this point in the mRNA.
markschemeHtml:
a. the gene code occurs in triplets ✔

b. the stop codon would not be part of the reading frame ✔

c. the code for a polypeptide would contain more codons ✔
